zh: 神爱世人，甚至将他的独生子赐给他们，叫一切信他的不至灭亡，反得永生。
en: For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life.

zh: 耶和华是我的牧者，我必不至缺乏。
en: The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want.

zh: 我虽然行过死荫的幽谷，也不怕遭害，因为你与我同在。
en: Even though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death, I will fear no evil, for you are with me.

zh: 你要专心仰赖耶和华，不可倚靠自己的聪明。
en: Trust in the Lord with all your heart and lean not on your own understanding.

zh: 在你一切所行的事上都要认定他，他必指引你的路。
en: In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make your paths straight.

zh: 我们晓得万事都互相效力，叫爱神的人得益处。
en: And we know that in all things God works for the good of those who love him.

zh: 你当刚强壮胆，不要惧怕，也不要惊惶，因为你无论往哪里去，耶和华你的神必与你同在。
en: Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid; do not be discouraged, for the Lord your God will be with you wherever you go.

zh: 凡劳苦担重担的人可以到我这里来，我就使你们得安息。
en: Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.

zh: 你们是世上的光，城造在山上是不能隐藏的。
en: You are the light of the world. A city set on a hill cannot be hidden.

zh: 你们的光也当这样照在人前，叫他们看见你们的好行为，便将荣耀归给你们在天上的父。
en: Let your light shine before others, that they may see your good deeds and glorify your Father in heaven.

zh: 不要效法这个世界，只要心意更新而变化。
en: Do not conform to the pattern of this world, but be transformed by the renewing of your mind.

zh: 神是我们的避难所，是我们的力量，是我们在患难中随时的帮助。
en: God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble.

zh: 信就是所望之事的实底，是未见之事的确据。
en: Now faith is confidence in what we hope for and assurance about what we do not see.

zh: 爱是恒久忍耐，又有恩慈。
en: Love is patient, love is kind.

zh: 如今常存的有信、有望、有爱这三样，其中最大的是爱。
en: And now these three remain: faith, hope and love. But the greatest of these is love.

zh: 我们行善不可丧志，若不灰心，到了时候就要收成。
en: Let us not grow weary of doing good, for at the proper time we will reap a harvest if we do not give up.

zh: 你们中间若有缺少智慧的，应当求那厚赐与众人也不斥责人的神。
en: If any of you lacks wisdom, you should ask God, who gives generously to all without finding fault.

zh: 各样美善的恩赐和各样全备的赏赐都是从上头来的。
en: Every good and perfect gift is from above.

zh: 你们要将一切的忧虑卸给神，因为他顾念你们。
en: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.

zh: 又要以耶和华为乐，他就将你心里所求的赐给你。
en: Take delight in the Lord, and he will give you the desires of your heart.

zh: 但那等候耶和华的必重新得力。
en: But those who hope in the Lord will renew their strength.

zh: 我就是道路、真理、生命。
en: I am the way and the truth and the life.

zh: 我留下平安给你们，我将我的平安赐给你们。
en: Peace I leave with you; my peace I give you.

zh: 你的话是我脚前的灯，是我路上的光。
en: Your word is a lamp to my feet and a light to my path.

zh: 你们要先求他的国和他的义。
en: But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness.

zh: 你们要尝尝主恩的滋味，便知道他是美善。
en: Taste and see that the Lord is good.

zh: 你要把你的重担卸给耶和华，他必抚养你。
en: Cast your burden on the Lord, and he will sustain you.

zh: 这是耶和华所定的日子，我们在其中要高兴欢喜。
en: This is the day the Lord has made; let us rejoice and be glad in it.

zh: 我要向山举目，我的帮助从何而来。
en: I lift up my eyes to the mountains—where does my help come from?

zh: 我的帮助从造天地的耶和华而来。
en: My help comes from the Lord, the Maker of heaven and earth.

zh: 坚心倚赖你的，你必保守他十分平安。
en: You will keep in perfect peace those whose minds are steadfast, because they trust in you.

zh: 你从水中经过，我必与你同在。
en: When you pass through the waters, I will be with you.

zh: 凡为攻击你造成的器械必不利用。
en: No weapon forged against you will prevail.

zh: 我知道我向你们所怀的意念是赐平安的意念。
en: For I know the plans I have for you, declares the Lord, plans to prosper you and not to harm you.

zh: 我们不至消灭，是出于耶和华诸般的慈爱。
en: Because of the Lord’s great love we are not consumed.

zh: 每早晨这都是新的，你的诚实极其广大。
en: His mercies are new every morning; great is your faithfulness.

zh: 世人哪，耶和华已指示你何为善。
en: He has shown you, O mortal, what is good.

zh: 你们祈求，就给你们。
en: Ask and it will be given to you.

zh: 因为凡祈求的，就得着。
en: For everyone who asks receives.

zh: 你要尽心、尽性、尽意爱主你的神。
en: Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your mind.

zh: 要爱人如己。
en: Love your neighbor as yourself.

zh: 在信的人，凡事都能。
en: Everything is possible for one who believes.

zh: 因为出于神的话，没有一句不带能力的。
en: For nothing will be impossible with God.

zh: 你们愿意人怎样待你们，你们也要怎样待人。
en: Do to others as you would have them do to you.

zh: 你们这小群，不要惧怕。
en: Do not be afraid, little flock.

zh: 光照在黑暗里，黑暗却不接受光。
en: The light shines in the darkness, and the darkness has not overcome it.

zh: 我是世界的光。
en: I am the light of the world.

zh: 我来了，是要叫人得生命，并且得的更丰盛。
en: I have come that they may have life, and have it to the full.

zh: 复活在我，生命也在我。
en: I am the resurrection and the life.

zh: 但圣灵降临在你们身上，你们就必得着能力。
en: You will receive power when the Holy Spirit comes on you.

zh: 当信主耶稣，你和你一家都必得救。
en: Believe in the Lord Jesus, and you will be saved.

zh: 惟有基督在我们还作罪人的时候为我们死。
en: But God demonstrates his own love for us in this: While we were still sinners, Christ died for us.

zh: 你若口里认耶稣为主。
en: If you declare with your mouth, “Jesus is Lord,” you will be saved.

zh: 在指望中要喜乐。
en: Be joyful in hope, patient in affliction, faithful in prayer.

zh: 神是信实的，必不叫你们受试探过于所能受的。
en: God is faithful; he will not let you be tempted beyond what you can bear.

zh: 因我们行事为人是凭着信心，不是凭着眼见。
en: For we live by faith, not by sight.

zh: 我的恩典够你用的。
en: My grace is sufficient for you.

zh: 圣灵所结的果子就是仁爱、喜乐、和平。
en: But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace.

zh: 你们得救是本乎恩。
en: For it is by grace you have been saved.

zh: 要以恩慈相待。
en: Be kind and compassionate to one another.

zh: 你们要靠主常常喜乐。
en: Rejoice in the Lord always.

zh: 应当一无挂虑。
en: Do not be anxious about anything.

zh: 无论做什么，都要从心里做。
en: Whatever you do, work at it with all your heart.

zh: 要常常喜乐。
en: Rejoice always.

zh: 不住地祷告。
en: Pray continually.

zh: 凡事谢恩。
en: Give thanks in all circumstances.

zh: 你要为真道打那美好的仗。
en: Fight the good fight of the faith.

zh: 因为神赐给我们不是胆怯的心。
en: For God has not given us a spirit of fear.

zh: 圣经都是神所默示的。
en: All Scripture is God-breathed.

zh: 神的道是活泼的，是有功效的。
en: For the word of God is alive and active.

zh: 耶稣基督昨日、今日、一直到永远是一样的。
en: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.

zh: 只是你们要行道，不要单单听道。
en: Do not merely listen to the word, and so deceive yourselves. Do what it says.

zh: 你们亲近神，神就必亲近你们。
en: Come near to God and he will come near to you.

zh: 凡有血气的尽都如草。
en: All people are like grass.

zh: 你们是被拣选的族类。
en: But you are a chosen people.

zh: 我们若认自己的罪。
en: If we confess our sins, he is faithful and just and will forgive us our sins.

zh: 神就是爱。
en: God is love.

zh: 我们爱，因为神先爱我们。
en: We love because he first loved us.

zh: 看哪，我站在门外叩门。
en: Here I am! I stand at the door and knock.

zh: 神要擦去他们一切的眼泪。
en: He will wipe every tear from their eyes.

zh: 耶和华是我的亮光，是我的拯救，我还怕谁呢。
en: The Lord is my light and my salvation—whom shall I fear?

zh: 耶和华是我的力量，是我的盾牌。
en: The Lord is my strength and my shield.

zh: 因为耶和华的言语正直，凡他所做的尽都诚实。
en: For the word of the Lord is right and true.

zh: 惟独他是我的磐石，我的拯救。
en: Truly he is my rock and my salvation.

zh: 神是我心里的力量，又是我的福分，直到永远。
en: God is the strength of my heart and my portion forever.

zh: 求你指教我们怎样数算自己的日子。
en: Teach us to number our days.

zh: 他必不怕凶恶的信息。
en: They will have no fear of bad news.

zh: 我将你的话藏在心里，免得我得罪你。
en: I have hidden your word in my heart that I might not sin against you.

zh: 耶和华善待万民。
en: The Lord is good to all.

zh: 神造万物，各按其时成为美好。
en: He has made everything beautiful in its time.

zh: 两个人总比一个人好。
en: Two are better than one.

zh: 看哪，神是我的拯救。
en: Surely God is my salvation.

zh: 耶和华必然等候，要施恩给你们。
en: The Lord longs to be gracious to you.

zh: 因为我耶和华你的神必搀扶你的右手。
en: For I am the Lord your God who takes hold of your right hand.

zh: 耶和华说，我的意念非同你们的意念。
en: For my thoughts are not your thoughts.

zh: 我们务要认识耶和华。
en: Let us acknowledge the Lord.

zh: 耶和华你的神是施行拯救、大有能力的。
en: The Lord your God is with you, the Mighty Warrior who saves.

zh: 因为你的财宝在哪里，你的心也在那里。
en: For where your treasure is, there your heart will be also.

zh: 因为无论在哪里，有两三个人奉我的名聚会。
en: For where two or three gather in my name, there am I with them.

zh: 你们祈求，就给你们。
en: Ask and it will be given to you.

zh: 我就是生命的粮。
en: I am the bread of life.

zh: 我是葡萄树，你们是枝子。
en: I am the vine; you are the branches.

zh: 但愿使人有盼望的神。
en: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace.

zh: 人非有信，就不能得神的喜悦。
en: Without faith it is impossible to please God.

zh: 我是阿拉法，我是俄梅戛。
en: I am the Alpha and the Omega.

zh: 神看着一切所造的都甚好。
en: God saw all that he had made, and it was very good.

zh: 虹必现在云彩中，我看见，就要记念我与地上各样有血肉的活物所立的永约。
en: Whenever the rainbow appears in the clouds, I will see it and remember the everlasting covenant.

zh: 亚伯兰信耶和华，耶和华就以此为他的义。
en: Abram believed the Lord, and he credited it to him as righteousness.

zh: 耶和华必为你们争战，你们只管静默，不要作声。
en: The Lord will fight for you; you need only to be still.

zh: 耶和华是我的力量，我的诗歌，也成了我的拯救。
en: The Lord is my strength and my defense; he has become my salvation.

zh: 我的同在必和你同去，我必使你得安息。
en: My Presence will go with you, and I will give you rest.

zh: 却要爱人如己。
en: Love your neighbor as yourself.

zh: 愿耶和华赐福给你，保护你。
en: The Lord bless you and keep you.

zh: 愿耶和华使他的脸光照你，赐恩给你。
en: The Lord make his face shine on you and be gracious to you.

zh: 愿耶和华向你仰脸，赐你平安。
en: The Lord turn his face toward you and give you peace.

zh: 你要尽心、尽性、尽力爱耶和华你的神。
en: Love the Lord your God with all your heart and with all your soul and with all your strength.

zh: 你们当刚强壮胆，不要害怕。
en: Be strong and courageous. Do not be afraid.

zh: 至于我和我家，我们必定事奉耶和华。
en: But as for me and my household, we will serve the Lord.

zh: 人是看外貌，耶和华是看内心。
en: People look at the outward appearance, but the Lord looks at the heart.

zh: 神的道是完全的。
en: As for God, his way is perfect.

zh: 愿耶和华我们的神与我们同在。
en: May the Lord our God be with us.

zh: 要寻求耶和华与他的能力。
en: Look to the Lord and his strength.

zh: 这称为我名下的子民若是自卑、祷告。
en: If my people, who are called by my name, will humble themselves and pray.

zh: 因靠耶和华而得的喜乐是你们的力量。
en: The joy of the Lord is your strength.

zh: 我知道我的救赎主活着。
en: I know that my redeemer lives.

zh: 我必安然躺下睡觉。
en: In peace I will lie down and sleep.

zh: 我将耶和华常摆在我面前。
en: I keep my eyes always on the Lord.

zh: 诸天述说神的荣耀。
en: The heavens declare the glory of God.

zh: 一宿虽然有哭泣，早晨便必欢呼。
en: Weeping may stay for the night, but rejoicing comes in the morning.

zh: 义人的脚步被耶和华立定。
en: The Lord makes firm the steps of the one who delights in him.

zh: 因为耶和华神是日头，是盾牌。
en: For the Lord God is a sun and shield.

zh: 他必用自己的翎毛遮蔽你。
en: He will cover you with his feathers.

zh: 你们要向耶和华唱新歌。
en: Sing to the Lord a new song.

zh: 因为耶和华本为善。
en: For the Lord is good and his love endures forever.

zh: 我的心哪，你要称颂耶和华。
en: Praise the Lord, my soul, and forget not all his benefits.

zh: 你们要称谢耶和华，因他本为善。
en: Give thanks to the Lord, for he is good.

zh: 你的言语一解开，就发出亮光。
en: The unfolding of your words gives light.

zh: 我等候耶和华，我的心等候。
en: I wait for the Lord.

zh: 我呼求的日子，你就应允我。
en: When I called, you answered me.

zh: 你要保守你心，胜过保守一切。
en: Above all else, guard your heart.

zh: 你所做的，要交托耶和华。
en: Commit to the Lord whatever you do.

zh: 耶和华的名是坚固台。
en: The name of the Lord is a fortified tower.

zh: 人心多有计谋。
en: Many are the plans in a person's heart.

zh: 铁磨铁，磨出刃来。
en: As iron sharpens iron, so one person sharpens another.

zh: 事情的终局强如事情的起头。
en: The end of a matter is better than its beginning.

zh: 爱情，众水不能熄灭。
en: Many waters cannot quench love.

zh: 因有一婴孩为我们而生。
en: For to us a child is born.

zh: 草必枯干，花必凋残。
en: The grass withers and the flowers fall, but the word of our God endures forever.

zh: 主耶和华的灵在我身上。
en: The Spirit of the Sovereign Lord is on me.

zh: 倚靠耶和华的人有福了。
en: Blessed is the one who trusts in the Lord.

zh: 你求告我，我就应允你。
en: Call to me and I will answer you.

zh: 因为信靠他的神。
en: Because he trusted in his God.

zh: 这殿后来的荣耀必大过先前的荣耀。
en: The glory of this present house will be greater than the glory of the former house.

zh: 你们要将当纳的十分之一全然送入仓库。
en: Bring the whole tithe into the storehouse.

zh: 耶和华啊，早晨你必听我的声音。
en: In the morning, Lord, you hear my voice.

zh: 耶和华又要给受欺压的人作高台。
en: The Lord is a refuge for the oppressed.

zh: 耶和华是我的岩石，我的山寨。
en: The Lord is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer.

zh: 有人靠车，有人靠马。
en: Some trust in chariots and some in horses.

zh: 耶和华啊，求你将你的道指示我。
en: Show me your ways, Lord.

zh: 要等候耶和华。
en: Wait for the Lord; be strong and take heart.

zh: 凡仰望耶和华的人，你们都要壮胆。
en: Be strong and take heart, all you who hope in the Lord.

zh: 义人呼求，耶和华听见了。
en: The righteous cry out, and the Lord hears them.

zh: 我曾耐性等候耶和华。
en: I waited patiently for the Lord.

zh: 我的心哪，你为何忧闷。
en: Why, my soul, are you downcast?

zh: 你们要休息，要知道我是神。
en: Be still, and know that I am God.

zh: 我惧怕的时候要倚靠你。
en: When I am afraid, I put my trust in you.

zh: 神啊，你是我的神。
en: You, God, are my God.

zh: 主耶和华啊，你是我所盼望的。
en: For you have been my hope, Sovereign Lord.

zh: 但我亲近神是与我有益。
en: But as for me, it is good to be near God.

zh: 主啊，你本为良善。
en: You, Lord, are forgiving and good.

zh: 我要论到耶和华说。
en: I will say of the Lord, He is my refuge and my fortress.

zh: 我心里多忧多疑。
en: When anxiety was great within me, your consolation brought me joy.

zh: 耶和华有怜悯，有恩典。
en: The Lord is compassionate and gracious.

zh: 敬畏耶和华是智慧的开端。
en: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom.

zh: 有耶和华帮助我。
en: The Lord is with me; I will not be afraid.

zh: 耶和华要保护你。
en: The Lord will keep you from all harm.

zh: 以色列啊，你当仰望耶和华。
en: Put your hope in the Lord.

zh: 凡求告耶和华的。
en: The Lord is near to all who call on him.

zh: 敬畏耶和华是知识的开端。
en: The fear of the Lord is the beginning of knowledge.

zh: 爱能遮掩一切过错。
en: Love covers over all wrongs.

zh: 好施舍的，必得丰裕。
en: A generous person will prosper.

zh: 人心忧虑，屈而不伸。
en: Anxiety weighs down the heart.

zh: 回答柔和，使怒消退。
en: A gentle answer turns away wrath.

zh: 朋友乃时常亲爱。
en: A friend loves at all times.

zh: 追求公义仁慈的。
en: Whoever pursues righteousness and love finds life.

zh: 来吧，我们在耶和华的光明中行走。
en: Come, let us walk in the light of the Lord.

zh: 你们要向耶和华唱歌。
en: Sing to the Lord.

zh: 耶和华啊，你是我的神。
en: Lord, you are my God.

zh: 你们得救在乎归回安息。
en: In repentance and rest is your salvation.

zh: 疲乏的，他赐能力。
en: He gives strength to the weary.

zh: 我是耶和华你的神。
en: I am the Lord your God, who teaches you what is best.

zh: 我将你铭刻在我掌上。
en: See, I have engraved you on the palms of my hands.

zh: 我以永远的爱爱你。
en: I have loved you with an everlasting love.

zh: 凡等候耶和华。
en: The Lord is good to those whose hope is in him.

zh: 神的名是应当称颂的。
en: Praise be to the name of God forever and ever.

zh: 智慧人必发光。
en: Those who are wise will shine like the brightness of the heavens.

zh: 因为他有恩典，有怜悯。
en: For he is gracious and compassionate.

zh: 惟愿公平如大水滚滚。
en: Let justice roll on like a river.

zh: 我要仰望耶和华。
en: But as for me, I watch in hope for the Lord.

zh: 耶和华本为善。
en: The Lord is good, a refuge in times of trouble.

zh: 义人因信得生。
en: The righteous will live by faith.

zh: 主耶和华是我的力量。
en: The Sovereign Lord is my strength.
